speaker: Argo
text: Lord Baten... Am I allowed to invite him? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I guess I'll give it a shot... *sigh*
The bath on the stern of the ship is definitely a sight to behold.
*Hot water pours out of it even though it’s on a ship, and the surface ripples in synch with the ship’s rocking.*
“It’s as if a piece of the sea cut itself out and floated up. To me, this is the height of elegance and luxury.”

speaker: Argo
text: Lord Baten, thank you so much for joining me. *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: All ya gotta say is "water" and I'm there! *

speaker: Argo
text: This bath is amazing... I've never seen one like it before.

speaker: Baten
text: Heh heh, ain't I just the greatest? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I don’t even have to worry about the salty air making me sticky when I bathe like this.*

speaker: Baten
text: Exactly. It’s also great for avoidin' gettin' sick on long trips. *

speaker: Argo
text: (He's put a lot of thought into this…)

speaker: Baten
text: By the way, yer a Frontail sailor, right? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Yeah, an apprentice sailor to be exact.

speaker: Baten
text: So you still haven’t been out on the water by yourself, have ya?

speaker: Argo
text: No. I always went out on my old man’s boat. *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: I know! Let’s have yer exam be steerin' this ship! *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: What!? Me!?!

speaker: Baten
text: I mean, yer more used to the sea than the others.

speaker: Argo
text: Well... That may be true, but... *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: I’m gonna have a little talk with Derich.

speaker: Argo
text: ...Lord Baten, what do you think of him? *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: Huh? Why do ya ask? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Well… you know…

speaker: Baten
text: *Ha!*

speaker: Baten
text: We’re just friends. Nothin' more, nothin' less. *sigh*

speaker: Baten
text: So there’s no reason to be gettin' all jealous, ya little punk. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: I—I’m not… *sigh*
